name: Udyr

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Bridge Between
passive.description_source: Innate - Awakened Spirit:  Udyr has no ultimate ability and instead he has 4 basic abilities that each incur a  brief global cooldown. Each  ability grants a Stance that empowers his next two  basic attacks.

effects.description: Innate - Awakened Spirit: Udyr has no ultimate ability and instead has 4 basic abilities that each incur a 1.5-second global cooldown when cast. Each ability grants a Stance that empowers his basic attacks, and switching Stances will replace the empowered attacks of the previous Stance.

Periodically, after Udyr enters a Stance, he can cast it again at no cost after 0.25 seconds and within the following 5 seconds to Awaken it, empowering the Stance with an additional effect and placing the effect on cooldown.If Udyr does not consume the Awaken cast within the duration and has not switched Stances, his current Stance's respective ability incurs a 0.25-second cooldown. Awakened Spirit is placed on full cooldown at the start of the game.

Innate - Monk Training: After casting an ability, Udyr empowers his next two basic attacks on-hit within 4 seconds to gain 30% bonus attack speed and refund 5% of Awakened Spirit's total cooldown, though not if the remaining cooldown is less than 1 second.

passive.description: Innate - Awakened Spirit: Udyr has no ultimate ability and instead has 4 basic abilities that each incur a 1.5-second global cooldown when cast. Each ability grants a Stance that empowers his basic attacks, and switching Stances will replace the empowered attacks of the previous Stance.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Awakened Spirit's cooldown is affected by ultimate haste.

basic_ability_1.name: Wilding Claw
basic_ability_1.description_source: Claw Stance:  Udyr first two basic attacks deal bonus physical damage equal to a portion of the target's maximum health. Additionally, he gains  attack speed and bonus on-hit physical damage for a few seconds.

effects.context_notes: Active - Stance: Udyr enters Claw Stance, empowering his next two basic attacks to gain 50 bonus range and deal bonus physical damage on-hit, capped at 15 (+ 100% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP) against monsters.

Active - Stance: Udyr enters Claw Stance, empowering his next two basic attacks to gain 50 bonus range and deal bonus physical damage on-hit, capped at 15 (+ 100% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP) against monsters.
Additionally, Udyr gains bonus attack speed and deals bonus physical damage on-hit for 4 seconds.
Additionally, Udyr gains bonus attack speed and deals bonus physical damage on-hit for 4 seconds.

effects.description: Recast - Awaken: Udyr gains an additional 20% : 75.88% (based on level) bonus attack speed. The empowered attacks deal an additional 2% : 4.24% (based on level) (+ 3% per 100 bonus AD) of the target's maximum health bonus physical damage if used within 4 seconds. Udyr's next two basic attacks on-hit in any Stance within 4 seconds are each empowered to strike with lightning[ 6 times over 1 second, ][ every 0.2 seconds over 1 second, ]dealing bonus magic damage equal to 1.5% : 3.18% (based on level) (+ 0.8% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health per hit, chaining to up to 3 nearby visible enemies and being able to hit the same target multiple times, for a total of 9% : 19.06% (based on level) (+ 4.8% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health. Each lightning strike deals a minimum of 40 : 174.12 (based on level) against minions and is capped at 15 (+ 100% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP) against monsters.

basic_ability_1.description: Active - Stance: Udyr enters Claw Stance, empowering his next two basic attacks to gain 50 bonus range and deal bonus physical damage on-hit, capped at 15 (+ 100% bonus AD) (+ 50% AP) against monsters.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Deals spell damage to the primary target and applies area damage on the lightning strikes.

basic_ability_2.name: Iron Mantle
basic_ability_2.description_source: Mantle Stance:  Udyr gains a  shield and his next two basic attacks gain  life steal and  heal him.

effects.context_notes: Active - Stance: Udyr enters Mantle Stance, empowering his next two basic attacks on-hit to gain life steal and heal him for 1.
Additionally, Udyr grants himself a shield for 4 seconds.
Recast - Awaken: Udyr increases the shield's strength, stacking with the remaining shield from the first cast, and heals every 0.
Recast - Awaken: Udyr increases the shield's strength, stacking with the remaining shield from the first cast, and heals every 0.
Recast - Awaken: Udyr increases the shield's strength, stacking with the remaining shield from the first cast, and heals every 0.
Recast - Awaken: Udyr increases the shield's strength, stacking with the remaining shield from the first cast, and heals every 0.

effects.description: Healing on-hit is reduced to 60% against minions.

basic_ability_2.description: Active - Stance: Udyr enters Mantle Stance, empowering his next two basic attacks on-hit to gain life steal and heal him for 1.2% of his maximum health (+ 8% AP).
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The empowered attacks apply spell effects to the target.

basic_ability_3.name: Blazing Stampede
basic_ability_3.description_source: Stampede Stance:  Udyr gains  ghosting and a burst of  movement speed that decays over a few seconds. His attacks in this stance briefly  stun his target, but this cannot affect them more than once every few seconds.

effects.description: Active - Stance: Udyr enters Stampede Stance, empowering his basic attacks to have an uncancellable windup and pounce on the target to stun them for 0.75 seconds. This cannot affect the same target more than once every few seconds.

effects.context_notes: Additionally, Udyr becomes ghosted and gains bonus movement speed for 4 seconds, which decays to 30% effectiveness over 1.
Additionally, Udyr becomes ghosted and gains bonus movement speed for 4 seconds, which decays to 30% effectiveness over 1.

effects.description: Recast - Awaken: Udyr gains 75 bonus attack range and an additional 30% : 41.18% (based on level) bonus movement speed. He also gains immunity to crowd control for 1.5 seconds.

basic_ability_3.description: Active - Stance: Udyr enters Stampede Stance, empowering his basic attacks to have an uncancellable windup and pounce on the target to stun them for 0.75 seconds. This cannot affect the same target more than once every few seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Udyr cannot dash while grounded or rooted, but he will still declare the empowered attack.

ultimate.name: Wingborne Storm
ultimate.description_source: Storm Stance:  Udyr summons a blizzard around himself for a few seconds that continuously deals magic damage and  slows enemies inside. His next two basic attacks each cause the blizzard to deal a burst of additional magic damage to enemies inside it.

effects.description: Active - Stance: Udyr enters Storm Stance, empowering his next two basic attacks on-hit to deal 10 : 43.53 (based on level) (+ 35% AP) magic damage to nearby enemies.

effects.context_notes: Additionally, Udyr summons a blizzard around himself for 4 seconds that deals magic damage every 0.
Additionally, Udyr summons a blizzard around himself for 4 seconds that deals magic damage every 0.
Additionally, Udyr summons a blizzard around himself for 4 seconds that deals magic damage every 0.

Recast - Awaken: Udyr ends the blizzard if it is active and unleashes a glacial storm for 4 seconds that is able to move on its own, as well as causes the empowered attacks to instead deal their damage to enemies within that storm.

effects.description: The storm grants sight of its surroundings and prioritizes following the last enemy Udyr attacked while it was active, then enemy champions, then non-champions, then Udyr. The storm can only follow visible enemies.

ultimate.description: Active - Stance: Udyr enters Storm Stance, empowering his next two basic attacks on-hit to deal 10 : 43.53 (based on level) (+ 35% AP) magic damage to nearby enemies.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The storm that Udyr surrounds himself with is independent from the unleashed storm.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
